truth_boundary: This ledger records only evidence verified through connected repositories, File Library, Google Drive, DigitalOcean, Vercel and Supabase. It does not convert owner-only, credential, billing, recovery-console, missing-byte or production-acceptance gates into completion.

resolved_this_pass.rollback: Application rollback is backward compatible because the migration is additive. Column removal is prohibited without a separate approved data-loss review.
